info.name: FixIt API Tests
info.description: Generated from synced FixIt routes.php and frontend api.js. Import with the FixIt Local Environment. Secure-channel endpoints are included with plaintext payload references and header placeholders; they require the app's X25519/AES-GCM/HMAC wrapper to execute successfully.

exec: pm.test('response is not a server error', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.below(500); });
const ct = pm.response.headers.get('Content-Type') || '';
if (pm.response.text() && ct.includes('application/json')) { pm.test('response is valid JSON', function () { pm.response.json(); }); }
pm.test('status is 2xx', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.within(200, 299); });

pm.test('login succeeded', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.within(200, 299); });
const json = pm.response.json();
pm.test('token returned', function () { pm.expect(json.token).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
if (json.token) pm.collectionVariables.set('customer_token', json.token);
if (json.token) pm.environment.set('customer_token', json.token);
if (json.user) pm.environment.set('last_user_id', json.user.id);

request.description: SECURE CHANNEL REQUIRED: this route has SecureChannelMiddleware. The app encrypts/signs the body with X25519 + HKDF + AES-256-GCM + HMAC. GET has no HTTP body, so the client sends the encrypted payload in an X-Sec-Body header instead. Plain JSON is included only as the pre-encryption payload reference; it will not pass unless wrapped by the secure transport.

exec: pm.test('response is not a server error', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.below(500); });
const ct = pm.response.headers.get('Content-Type') || '';
if (pm.response.text() && ct.includes('application/json')) { pm.test('response is valid JSON', function () { pm.response.json(); }); }

request.description: Starts the dynamic secure channel. client_pub must be a base64 raw X25519 public key generated by the client.

exec: pm.test('response is not a server error', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.below(500); });
const ct = pm.response.headers.get('Content-Type') || '';
if (pm.response.text() && ct.includes('application/json')) { pm.test('response is valid JSON', function () { pm.response.json(); }); }
if (pm.response.code >= 200 && pm.response.code < 300) { const j = pm.response.json(); if (j.session_id) pm.environment.set('secure_session', j.session_id); }
pm.test('status is 2xx', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.be.within(200, 299); });
